roa.docketEntryComment: DEF REQUEST TO W/DRAW MOTION TO REINSTATE COMPLAINT, FILED
DA'S MOT TO REINSTATE COMPLAINT/RESTORE PRIOR CUST STATUS & PROPOSEDBRIEFING SCHEDULE -FILED
/CAL:DA MOTION TO REINSTATE COMPLAINT & RESTORE DEFENDANT TO PRIOR CUSTODYSTAUS, PEOPLE'S REQUEST TO WITHDRAW MOTION/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:MOTION WITHDRAWN BY THEPEOPLE/

/CAL: DA TO COMPLETE RECORD/X: THE DA'S OFFICE LODGES WITH THE COURT NEW COPIES OF EXHIBITS PRESENTED AT PRELIMINARY HEARING SPECIFICALLY EXHIBITS P-1, P-3 AND P-5/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:  CASE WAS DISCHARGED AFTER PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DA'S OFFICE WILL MAKE A MOTIONPURSUANT TO PC871,5  /

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN: DAVID STEVENSON /WIT SWORN: MICHELE MARTINEZ/EXHMA: P-1, CD RECORDING OF PHONE MESSAGE LEFT BY DEFENDANT, P-2,A SCREENSHOT OF WITNESS STEVENSON'S COMPUTER SCREEN ON THE DAY OF THE INCIDENT, P-3, CD OF ALL OF DEFENDANT'S TWITTER ACCOUNTS, P-4, A SCREENSHOT FROMDEFENDANT'S TWITTER ACCOUNT, P-5, CERTIFIED COPY OF DEFENDANT'S CI&I /871D: 1, 2, 3, 4/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE COURT DECLARES A DOUBT AS TO THE DEFENDANT'S COMPETENCY,/X: THE DEFENSE MOVES TO HOLD PRELIMINARY HEARING PURSUANTTO 1368,1PC/CPSS/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN: JESUS NAVAREZ, SFPD/CONTD: CONCLUSION OF BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: I&A, P&C/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 08-08-16/987,2/BAIL: 200000/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: THE DEFENDANT IS ILL AND CANNOT COME TO COURT,/BAIL:200000/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/DOP/
